name: Test databao build with Snowflake from init config
description: Initialize a project with Snowflake using interactive configuration and verify the generated config file.
descriptionHtml: Initialize a project with Snowflake using interactive configuration and verify the generated config file.

testStage.description: Initialize a project with Snowflake using interactive configuration and verify the generated config file.

steps.name: Answering prompt ''What type of datasource do you want to add\?'' with ''snowflake''

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.value: 'What type of datasource do you want to add\?'

steps.name: Answering prompt ''Do you want to check the connection to this new datasource\? \[y/N\]:'' with ''y''

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.value: 'Do you want to check the connection to this new datasource\? \[y/N\]:'

parameters.name: database
parameters.value: SnowflakeDB(datasource_name='my_test_snowflake', account='{{ env_var("SNOWFLAKE_ACCOUNT") }}', warehouse='{{ env_var("SNOWFLAKE_WAREHOUSE") }}', database='{{ env_var("SNOWFLAKE_DATABASE") }}', user='{{ env_var("SNOWFLAKE_TEST_USER") }}', role=None, auth=SnowflakeKeyPairAuth(private_key_file=None, private_key_file_pwd=None, private_key='{{ env_var("SNOWFLAKE_PRIVATE_TOKEN") }}'), check_connection=True, check_connection_succeed=True)

parameters.name: db
parameters.value: SnowflakeDB(datasource_name='my_test_snowflake', account='{{ env_var("SNOWFLAKE_ACCOUNT") }}', warehouse='{{ env_var("SNOWFLAKE_WAREHOUSE") }}', database='{{ env_var("SNOWFLAKE_DATABASE") }}', user='{{ env_var("SNOWFLAKE_TEST_USER") }}', role=None, auth=SnowflakeKeyPairAuth(private_key_file=None, private_key_file_pwd=None, private_key='{{ env_var("SNOWFLAKE_PRIVATE_TOKEN") }}'), check_connection=True, check_connection_succeed=True)
